title: February 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 11''' is the 42nd day of the year. There are 323 days remaining, 324 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1915|1915]] – [[Pat Welsh]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Lee Tockar]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[William Conrad]] dies.
*[[1996]] – [[Brian Daley]] dies.
*[[1998]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' unabridged cassette released.
*[[2004]] – [[Tony Pope]] dies.
*2004 – [[Star Wars: Republic: Rite of Passage (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Rite of Passage'' trade paperback]] published.
*2004 – "[[Day of the Sepulchral Night (short story)|Day of the Sepulchral Night]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – [[The Clone Wars 4|''The Clone Wars'' 4]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Ghosts of Mortis]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2011 – ''[[Timeline 12: The Great Hyperspace War]]'' released on on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 1|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 1]] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[R2-D2 is LOST!]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 8: Defend the Republic!]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 7 — A Rogue's End]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Target Vader (TPB)|''Star Wars: Target Vader'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2022]] – "[[The Book of Boba Fett: Vol. 2 (Chapters 5-7) (Original Soundtrack)|''The Book of Boba Fett'': Vol. 2 (Chapters 5-7) [Original Soundtrack]]]" was digitally released.
*[[2026]] – [[Jar Jar 1|''Jar Jar'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
